scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,violet "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,server,hermes -c cyan,violet,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "node scripts/start-hermes.mjs"
scripts.build: npm run build -w db && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.start:prod: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run start -w server
